title: hydrocotyle hookeri subsp. handelii
intro: Hydrocotyle hookeri subsp. handelii, also known as Indian pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the genus Hydrocotyle. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-anxiety effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing stress, and improving cognitive function. Hydrocotyle hookeri subsp. handelii is typically prepared for herbal use through the infusion of its leaves in hot water, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application.
